name: Plain
description: Monitor Plain customer support platform for team access and communication compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Plain at https://app.plain.com
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Create a new API key with read access
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Plain Settings → API Keys

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Plain support platform users with access to customer conversations

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Plain customer support platform is operational
